templates.name: Standing plea
templates.description: Pet standing upright on hind legs with wide innocent eyes and a sticker-style border. Pleading, guilty, or "please?" energy.
templates.stylePrompt: Pet standing on hind legs like a small guilty or pleading animal, wide innocent eyes, optional white rounded sticker border, wholesome meme composition centered on the pet.
captionHints: when you ask for one more treat

templates.name: Thinking hands
templates.description: Tight close-up of a pet face with small cartoon hands clasped under the chin in a plotting or deep-thought pose.
templates.stylePrompt: Close-up pet face with small human hands clasped under the chin in a thinking or scheming pose, warm low-fi meme aesthetic, solemn expression.

templates.name: The dog in me
templates.description: Bold setup line at the top, a smaller "the dog:" label, then an ironic cute pet photo as the punchline.
templates.stylePrompt: Two-part text meme: bold white caption with thick black outline at the top (tough or confident setup quote), smaller "the dog:" label, then the pet photo as an ironic punchline that contrasts the caption.
captionHints: I got that dog in me

templates.name: Swag / no thoughts
templates.description: Derpy close-up with tongue blep and a casual shaka-hand emoji overlay. Chaotic wholesome vibes.
templates.stylePrompt: Derpy close-up pet face with tongue slightly out, wide confused eyes, optional yellow shaka/call-me hand emoji overlay, grainy viral meme energy.
